## Completion Notes

Story implementation has been completed successfully with all 9 acceptance criteria verified PASS during QA verification phase. The story covered:

- AC-1: /wt:status enhanced with DB-backed worktree view
- AC-2: Graceful degradation when worktree_list_active MCP tool unavailable
- AC-3: [ORPHANED] detection for missing worktree paths
- AC-4: [UNTRACKED] detection for git worktrees not in DB
- AC-5: Take-over option requires explicit confirmation at all autonomy levels
- AC-6: Ordered worktree_mark_complete -> null-check -> abort-or-proceed -> wt:new sequence
- AC-7: Cross-reference documentation for WINT-1130/WINT-1140/WINT-1160
- AC-8: wt-status skill upgraded to version 2.0.0
- AC-9: Integration test scenarios IT-1/IT-2/IT-3 documented with proper test plan

The story is now ready for UAT acceptance and final sign-off.
